chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA C. P. No.D-712 of 2025. DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection ‘A’. 2. For hearing of main case. 07.08.2025 Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Addl. A. G, Sindh a/w Muhammad Saleem Tanvri, Executive Engineer, Rice Canal Division Larkana and Abdul Khaliq Abbasi, Asstt. Executive Engineer, Ghaar Sub- Division Larkana. -.-.-.-.- Respondent No.3 places on record photographs which show that the flow of water has been restored and reached to the lands of the petitioner. Mr. Wakeel Ali Shaikh, advocate holds brief for Mr. Javed Ali Gopang, advocate for the petitioner on the ground that the latter learned counsel due to his personal engagements is not in attendance and seeks date. However, when confronted with the photographs submitted by the respondent No.3, counsel who is holding brief for learned counsel for the petitioner seeks disposal of the petition. Accordingly in view of mutual consent this petition is hereby disposed of; however, in case compliance so made today will be found not in consonance with the averments and prayer of the petition, the petitioner will be at liberty to file appropriate application before the Court, if so advised. The official respondents shall ensure that the compliance made in the petition shall not be disturbed. Judge Judge M.Yousuf Panhwar/**
